channel.title: Europe on Mariatta
channel.description: Recent content in Europe on Mariatta

item.title: Travel Planning with AI
item.description:
Travel Planning with AI

I have started planning my family’s travel with the assistance of Claude Code. It resulted in a website that contains information about our travel destination, potential activities we could take, hotel recommendations, restaurant suggestions, and even a checklist with timelines for me to keep track of the planning progress, all the information needed in order to plan and decide about our family vacation.

You can check the website here. It was created 100% with Claude. I wrote no code. I didn’t even write the commit messages. I told Claude Code to do it on my behalf, even the creation of the GitHub Repo and pushing it to my GitHub account, were all done by Claude.

item.title: Ice Cream Selfie @ PyCon DE 2019
item.description:
Hokey Pokey

Lucie recommended this place, and we met up and get to chat and catch up.

Check out Eispatisserie Hokey Pokey in Berlin!

A special #IceCreamSelfie with @Patjouk #PyConDE
🍦😝🤳 pic.twitter.com/SFoQy6JI1x

— Mariatta 🤦 (@mariatta) October 13, 2019

item.title: Ice Cream Selfie @ DjangoCon Europe, PyCon Italy 2017
item.description:
Hero image photo by Bartek Pawlik, DjangoCon Europe.

Icy Dot Wine

I was just walking around in Florence, having given my talk at two conferences in the same week: PyCon Italy and DjangoCon Europe 2017.

At that time, Ice cream selfie isn’t quite a ritual yet, so I didn’t even know which shop this was.

After many years, I tracked down the shop name! This was from Icy Dot Wine.
